title: oxalis hirsuta
intro: Oxalis hirsuta, also known as hairy wood sorrel, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Oxalidaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of oxalic acid, which has been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Oxalis hirsuta include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a diuretic, and its leaves and roots can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures.
